text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 33 

CLM_MDCL_REC 

LABEL: Claim Medical Record Number 

DESCRIPTION: The number assigned by the provider to the beneficiary's medical record to assist in record retrieval. 
The medical record number has special significance for chart review encounters. When the chart 
review’s purpose is to delete a diagnosis code from the claim, the medical record number should be 
“8”. 

SHORT NAME:
